fullText:
Armada Invencible (Chinese: ç„ˇć•µč‰¦éšŠ) is a steel water roller coaster located at Formosan Aboriginal Culture Village in Yuchr Shiang, Nantou County, Taiwan. It was once named Caribbean Splash from 2008 to 2018.



Single car trains. Riders are arranged 4 across in 4 rows for a total of 16 riders per car.
